slides.title: Talking to Humans 💬
slides.content:
Code is for computers, but **comments** are for humans.

Dart ignores comments, so you can leave notes to explain what your code does.

slides.title: Adding Comments
slides.content: Use `//` for a single line comment, or `/*` and `*/` for multiple lines.

quizData.question: Which symbol is used for a single-line comment in Dart?
